name: autoloop
description: Autoloop and its engineering-skill dependency for Claude Code.

plugins.name: autoloop
plugins.description: Dual-host standing dev loop for Claude Code and Codex CLI: issues in, gated + independently reviewed PRs out. Writer ≠ reviewer; a human merges.

plugins.name: agent-skills
plugins.description: Dependency of autoloop (mirrored listing so it auto-installs from this marketplace): production-grade engineering skills covering spec, plan, build, verify, review, and ship. Upstream: github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills (MIT).
